title: Dora-mu
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''dora-mu''' was a giant, marine creature from the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]'s [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|home galaxy]]. It was covered by hundreds of long, chitinous green scales which were able to withstand [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] shots and could heal over time.

Its scales were used by [[Shaper caste|Shapers]] for the armor of an aquatic vehicle called the [[Vangaak]]. However, these scales did not die upon removal from the dora-mu since they could mold themselves onto the Vangaak's skeleton and receive nourishment from the living craft.
